rationale: The citing editorial gives Beck, Wuyts, and Jap (2024) a specific functional role in its overview of the special issue, summarizing both its core finding (platform practices that mitigate fakery and build trust) and its multimethod design. The paper is also featured in Table 1 with dedicated focus, key findings, and implications, which the editorial uses to evidence the breadth of mitigation research domains. This goes beyond a purely passing mention, even though it is presented alongside other included articles. The citation is not an extension, refinement, challenge, or direct application, but a substantive integrative summary role.
relation_description: The citing paper substantively incorporates the cited article as a featured contribution in the special issue, using its findings and methods to illustrate how mitigation-oriented research addresses misinformation and trust in online review platforms. The cited work supports the editorial's broader synthesis of MiM scope and methodological diversity.
